inventory.captureMethod: Playwright Chromium, clean headless context, app main viewport clip
inventory.privacyStatus: public-safe after crop; unavailable integrations shown as scope boundaries
inventory.cropOrBlurApplied: Cropped to app main content viewport; browser chrome, topbar, sidebar, and user panel excluded. No blur applied.
inventory.notes: Readiness page showing unavailable deployment integrations and explicit scope boundaries.

inventory.captureMethod: Playwright Chromium, clean headless viewer context, app header/action viewport clip
inventory.privacyStatus: public-safe after tight crop; no service status, credentials, or email visible
inventory.cropOrBlurApplied: Tight crop to page header/action area only; browser chrome, topbar, sidebar, user panel, service table, and Degraded status excluded. No blur applied.
inventory.notes: Viewer services header showing read-only state and unavailable Add Service mutation action.

blocked.reason: Blocked because the fresh live manual check classified the deployed dashboard service Degraded due latency above the 1500 ms threshold; this did not satisfy the approved Healthy cover state.
Blocked because the public-safe services list showed the deployed dashboard service as Degraded, not Healthy.
Blocked because service detail did not show Current status Healthy / Latest result Success after the fresh live manual check.

stateNotes: Non-dashboard demo service was deactivated through the live UI in the prior capture attempt.
Dashboard service was pointed at the public health endpoint with expected version v0.1.0.
Fresh manual health checks completed through the live UI, but live server-observed latency remained above the 1500 ms Degraded threshold.
Invalid Degraded Overview, Services, Service Detail, and full Viewer table screenshots were removed from the approved screenshot set.
